road_network.title: Build a Via Romana road network connecting your base to 3 major locations — road blocks give travel speed bonus

merchant_trade.title: Complete a Via Romana merchant trade at a roadside waypoint — road merchants sell unique items

subtitle.text: Via Romana roads give a movement speed bonus. Build roads. Build a kingdom. The roads are the kingdom's arteries.

description: CH.15 · THE ROAD SYSTEM
▸ Via Romana adds road blocks that increase player movement speed.
Build roads between locations and ground travel becomes fast.
This complements Elytra (sky) with a ground network.
Villager Recruits (your army) uses ground movement.
Roads make your army faster too.
The kingdom's arteries are its roads.
◈ VIA ROMANA ROAD BLOCKS
└ Road blocks: crafted from stone/gravel/stone brick variants
Check JEI for viaromana: recipes
└ Speed bonus: player moves faster on Via Romana road blocks
Bonus stacks with Sprint (not with Elytra — ground only)
└ Road types: different materials give different bonuses
Higher quality road = higher speed multiplier
└ Road width: 3 blocks minimum for mounted travel
(horses, llamas, and Villager Recruits all benefit from width)
◈ ROAD NETWORK DESIGN
└ Priority connections:
Base → nearest village (trade route)
Base → End portal (emergency resupply route)
Base → major farm sites (Chorus, Enderman farm entrance)
└ Waypoints: Via Romana adds waypoint/merchant stops on roads
Place at road intersections for merchant trade access
└ Integration with Via Romana merchants: road merchants
sell unique items not available from vanilla villagers
└ Bountiful courier bounties: complete delivery bounties
by walking the road network between waypoints
◈ VILLAGER RECRUITS ON ROADS
└ 6 unit types (from Ch11 warlord quest): all use ground movement
└ Faster roads = faster deployment to defense locations
└ Road garrison: place guard units along road networks
for protection between base and village
└ Siege tactics: roads allow mass unit movement for outpost builds
▸ The Roman legions built roads first.
Then they conquered.
The roads were the conquest.
The territory that had roads was the territory you held.
Via Romana is not decoration.
It is a claim of permanence.
Build roads. The land becomes yours.
▶ Build a road network to 3+ locations [check]
▶ Complete a Via Romana merchant trade [check]
◇ Via Romana + Elytra = complete kingdom logistics.
You fly above the roads for fast solo travel.
Your recruits march the roads below.
Merchants travel the roads for trade.
The kingdom has ground, sky, and sea (Small Ships in Ch16).
Build the ground layer here.
